---
title: "\'Easter-tide at Hursley (1866)\'"
---

## \'Easter-tide at Hursley (1866)\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1866
**Genre:** Non-fiction, biographical article
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (May 1866) 385-91

### Notes

Obituary of the Rev. John Keble.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
